items.title: Filter vs wrapper vs embedded
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  data["labeled dataset X, y"] --> filterPath["filter: score each column"]
  data --> wrapperPath["wrapper: train model on subsets"]
  data --> embeddedPath["embedded: penalize during training"]
  filterPath --> topK["keep top-k features"]
  wrapperPath --> rfe["RFE loop"]
  embeddedPath --> l1["L1 zeros coefficients"]
  topK --> model["final model"]
  rfe --> model
  l1 --> model
items.caption: All three families reduce the feature set before or during modeling, but they differ in how tightly selection is coupled to the learner.

items.title: Recursive Feature Elimination loop
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  start["all features"] --> fit["fit estimator"]
  fit --> rank["rank by importance"]
  rank --> drop["remove weakest"]
  drop --> check{"k features left?"}
  check -->|no| fit
  check -->|yes| done["selected subset"]
items.caption: RFE repeatedly fits, ranks, and prunes until the target number of features remains.
